IDENTIFICATION DIVISION.
       PROGRAM-ID. CUSTOMER.

       ENVIRONMENT DIVISION.
       INPUT-OUTPUT SECTION.
       FILE-CONTROL.
           SELECT CUST-IN-FILE ASSIGN TO 'CUSTOMER.INPUT.FILE'.

       DATA DIVISION.
       FILE SECTION.
       FD CUST-IN-FILE.
       01 CUSTOMER-INPUT-RECORD.
          05 IN-CUSTOMER-ID       PIC 9(5).

       WORKING-STORAGE SECTION.
       01 WS-CUSTOMER-ID          PIC 9(5).
       01 WS-CUSTOMER-NAME        PIC X(30).
       01 WS-CUSTOMER-STATUS      PIC X(10).
       01 WS-CREDIT-LIMIT         PIC 9(7).
       01 WS-RISK-CATEGORY        PIC X(10).

       PROCEDURE DIVISION.
       MAIN-PARA.
           DISPLAY 'CUSTOMER SEARCH STARTED'.

           OPEN INPUT CUST-IN-FILE.
           READ CUST-IN-FILE
               AT END DISPLAY 'NO CUSTOMER INPUT FOUND'
           END-READ.

           MOVE IN-CUSTOMER-ID TO WS-CUSTOMER-ID.

           EXEC SQL
               SELECT CUSTOMER_NAME, CUSTOMER_STATUS, CREDIT_LIMIT
               INTO :WS-CUSTOMER-NAME, :WS-CUSTOMER-STATUS, :WS-CREDIT-LIMIT
               FROM CUSTOMER_MASTER
               WHERE CUSTOMER_ID = :WS-CUSTOMER-ID
           END-EXEC.

           IF WS-CREDIT-LIMIT > 100000
               MOVE 'HIGH' TO WS-RISK-CATEGORY
           ELSE
               MOVE 'NORMAL' TO WS-RISK-CATEGORY
           END-IF.

           EXEC SQL
               UPDATE CUSTOMER_MASTER
               SET RISK_CATEGORY = :WS-RISK-CATEGORY
               WHERE CUSTOMER_ID = :WS-CUSTOMER-ID
           END-EXEC.

           CALL 'CUSTAUDIT' USING WS-CUSTOMER-ID WS-RISK-CATEGORY.

           DISPLAY WS-CUSTOMER-NAME.
           DISPLAY WS-RISK-CATEGORY.

           CLOSE CUST-IN-FILE.
           STOP RUN.
CREATE TABLE CUSTOMER_MASTER (CUSTOMER_ID VARCHAR(10));

01 CUSTOMER-RECORD.
05 CUSTOMER-ID PIC X(10).
//DAILYBAT JOB (BATCH),'DAILY BATCH'

01 EMPLOYEE-RECORD.
          05 EMPLOYEE-ID              PIC 9(5).
          05 EMPLOYEE-NAME            PIC X(30).
          05 EMPLOYEE-DEPARTMENT      PIC X(20).
          05 EMPLOYEE-SALARY          PIC 9(7).
          05 EMPLOYEE-GRADE           PIC X(2).
          05 EMPLOYEE-STATUS          PIC X(10).
          05 EMPLOYEE-JOIN-DATE.
             10 JOIN-YEAR             PIC 9(4).
             10 JOIN-MONTH            PIC 9(2).
             10 JOIN-DAY              PIC 9(2).
          05 EMPLOYEE-BANK-DETAILS.
             10 BANK-ID               PIC X(10).
             10 ACCOUNT-NUMBER        PIC X(18).
          05 EMPLOYEE-TAX-DETAILS.
             10 TAX-CODE              PIC X(5).
             10 TAX-AMOUNT            PIC 9(5).
             10 NET-SALARY            PIC 9(7).

IDENTIFICATION DIVISION.
PROGRAM-ID. FUNDSXFER.
PROCEDURE DIVISION.
    EXEC SQL
        UPDATE ACCOUNT_MASTER
        SET BALANCE = BALANCE - 100
    END-EXEC.
    CALL 'FRAUDCHK'.
    STOP RUN.

IDENTIFICATION DIVISION.
PROGRAM-ID. INTCALC.
PROCEDURE DIVISION.
    COMPUTE INTEREST = PRINCIPAL * RATE / 100.
    STOP RUN.
SELECT * FROM PAYMENT_AUDIT;

//PAYJOB JOB (ACCT),'PAYROLL JOB'

01 PAYROLL-RECORD.
05 EMP-ID PIC X(08).

IDENTIFICATION DIVISION.
       PROGRAM-ID. PAYROLL.

       ENVIRONMENT DIVISION.
       INPUT-OUTPUT SECTION.
       FILE-CONTROL.
           SELECT EMP-IN-FILE ASSIGN TO 'EMP.INPUT.FILE'.
           SELECT PAY-OUT-FILE ASSIGN TO 'EMP.OUTPUT.FILE'.

       DATA DIVISION.
       FILE SECTION.
       FD EMP-IN-FILE.
       COPY EMPREC.

       FD PAY-OUT-FILE.
       01 PAYROLL-OUTPUT-RECORD.
          05 OUT-EMP-ID       PIC 9(5).
          05 OUT-TAX-AMOUNT   PIC 9(5).
          05 OUT-NET-SALARY   PIC 9(7).

       WORKING-STORAGE SECTION.
       01 WS-EMP-ID           PIC 9(5).
       01 WS-EMP-SALARY       PIC 9(7).
       01 WS-TAX-AMOUNT       PIC 9(5).
       01 WS-NET-SALARY       PIC 9(7).
       01 WS-PAYROLL-STATUS   PIC X(10).

       PROCEDURE DIVISION.
       MAIN-PARA.
           DISPLAY 'PAYROLL PROCESS STARTED'.

           OPEN INPUT EMP-IN-FILE.
           OPEN OUTPUT PAY-OUT-FILE.

           CALL 'EMPREAD' USING WS-EMP-ID WS-EMP-SALARY.
           CALL 'TAXCALC' USING WS-EMP-SALARY WS-TAX-AMOUNT.

           IF WS-EMP-SALARY > 50000
               MOVE 5000 TO WS-TAX-AMOUNT
               MOVE 'HIGH-TAX' TO WS-PAYROLL-STATUS
           ELSE
               MOVE 2000 TO WS-TAX-AMOUNT
               MOVE 'STD-TAX' TO WS-PAYROLL-STATUS
           END-IF.

           COMPUTE WS-NET-SALARY = WS-EMP-SALARY - WS-TAX-AMOUNT.

           EXEC SQL
               SELECT EMPLOYEE_ID, EMPLOYEE_SALARY
               INTO :WS-EMP-ID, :WS-EMP-SALARY
               FROM EMP_MASTER
               WHERE EMPLOYEE_ID = :WS-EMP-ID
           END-EXEC.

           EXEC SQL
               UPDATE EMP_MASTER
               SET TAX_AMOUNT = :WS-TAX-AMOUNT,
                   NET_SALARY = :WS-NET-SALARY,
                   PAYROLL_STATUS = :WS-PAYROLL-STATUS
               WHERE EMPLOYEE_ID = :WS-EMP-ID
           END-EXEC.

           EXEC SQL
               INSERT INTO PAYROLL_AUDIT
               (EMPLOYEE_ID, TAX_AMOUNT, NET_SALARY, STATUS)
               VALUES (:WS-EMP-ID, :WS-TAX-AMOUNT, :WS-NET-SALARY, :WS-PAYROLL-STATUS)
           END-EXEC.

           MOVE WS-EMP-ID TO OUT-EMP-ID.
           MOVE WS-TAX-AMOUNT TO OUT-TAX-AMOUNT.
           MOVE WS-NET-SALARY TO OUT-NET-SALARY.
           WRITE PAYROLL-OUTPUT-RECORD.

           CLOSE EMP-IN-FILE.
           CLOSE PAY-OUT-FILE.

           DISPLAY 'PAYROLL PROCESS COMPLETED'.
           STOP RUN.
CREATE TABLE EMP_PAYROLL (EMP_ID VARCHAR(8));
